name: Stars Align across the Milky Way
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>逢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>河</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>が</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Reveal 1 Ritual Monster in your hand; add 1 Ritual Monster with the same Level but a different name from your Deck to your hand. You can banish this card from your GY and send 1 Ritual Spell from your hand to the GY; this effect becomes that card's effect that Ritual Summons a monster when the card is activated. You can only use each effect of "Stars Align across the Milky Way" once per turn.
eff: Reveal 1 Ritual Monster in your hand; add 1 Ritual Monster with the same Level but a different name from your Deck to your hand. You can banish this card from your GY and send 1 Ritual Spell from your hand to the GY; this effect becomes that card's effect that Ritual Summons a monster when the card is activated. You can only use each effect of "Stars Align across the Milky Way" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
